title: Sprint-Endurance Combo
description: Sprint power layered on fatigued legs
purpose: Sprint power layered on fatigued legs

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 72%, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 72% for 8:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 8:00 at 72%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 72% for 8:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 72% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/11. 0:10 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 23% complete. Rep 2/11. 200% at 95-120 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23% done. 9 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/11. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/11. 200% FTP, 95-120 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:50 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 24% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 72% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 7:50 at 72%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/11. 0:10 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 200% FTP, Standing. 10s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 200%, 95-120 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/11. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 34% into session. 200%, 95-120 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 34% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 72% for 7:50. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 72%, 85-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 34% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 200% for 10s. Then 41min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45% through. This is your workout. Own it. 200% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 45% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 6/11. 200% FTP × 10s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 45% complete. 72% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 200% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:10 at 200%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 42 minutes of work done. 33 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8/11. 42 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 3 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 56% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 72% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 56% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 56% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 1 intervals left. 25 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 10 of 11. Target: 200% FTP, 95-120 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50 minutes of work done. 25 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 10. 1 to go. 25 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Your aerobic system is thanking you.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 65-65% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 65%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 15:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 65% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
